Africa Map Kitchen Towel Clementine & Green
Description:
This Kitchen towel is woven with the map of Africa against a bold and striking colourful background, making it a stylish and unique way to show off your love of the continent.

The towel is woven with 100% African cotton for a soft and absorbent towel that is also durable. Whether you use it to dry dishes or wipe down counters, the Africa Map kitchen towel will add a touch of sophistication to your kitchen.

62 x 74cm / 24 x 30"

Pair with our Metallic Bogolan Tablecloths.
